description:
Create a 'Newspaper Article' item in the Juris-M library with the following metadata:

- Title: Supreme Court Ruling Makes Same-Sex Marriage a Right Nationwide
- Author: Adam Liptak
- Publication: The New York Times
- Date: June 26, 2015
- Section: A
- Pages: A1
- Place: New York
- URL: https://www.nytimes.com/2015/06/27/us/supreme-court-same-sex-marriage.html
- Abstract: The Supreme Court ruled that the Constitution guarantees a right to same-sex marriage.

metadata.expected_title: Supreme Court Ruling Makes Same-Sex Marriage a Right Nationwide
